query:
SELECT wl.id, wl.code, wl.zoneCode, wl.zoneId, wz.code as zoneCodeFromZone
FROM warehouseLocations wl
LEFT JOIN warehouseZones wz ON wl.zoneId = wz.id
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 44TTARZqZm4zxSK.b3f2309fec40 --database VPbZo3VRZUT62wWDPHVeqm --execute SELECT wl.id, wl.code, wl.zoneCode, wl.zoneId, wz.code as zoneCodeFromZone
FROM warehouseLocations wl
LEFT JOIN warehouseZones wz ON wl.zoneId = wz.id
LIMIT 10;
